description: Community-based treatment protocols adapted for resource-limited settings

with_edema.details: Initial stabilization using locally available F75 equivalent (rice porridge with oil and sugar), transition to home-based RUTF alternatives when available
with_edema.follow_up: Daily visits by community health worker for first week, then every 2 days

without_edema.details: Home-based management with locally prepared therapeutic foods, family education, and community health worker supervision
without_edema.follow_up: Weekly community health worker visits, monthly clinic check-up

standard.details: Nutrition education, locally available supplementary foods, family counseling on food preparation and feeding practices
standard.follow_up: Bi-weekly community meetings, monthly individual assessment

standard.details: Regular nutrition education, promotion of local nutritious foods, family planning counseling, and community garden programs

standard.treatment: Community dietary counseling and lifestyle education
standard.details: Educate family to reduce high-calorie foods (fried foods, sweetened drinks, excess rice). Promote locally available fruits and vegetables. Encourage at least 60 minutes of daily active play.
standard.follow_up: Monthly community weight monitoring for 6 months, then quarterly
medications: Reduce cooking oil and sugar in household foods
Promote locally grown vegetables and fruits
monitoring: Monthly weight and height at community scale
Active play and physical activity observation

standard.treatment: Community health worker referral to nearest health center
standard.details: Community health worker provides dietary education and refers family to health center for clinical evaluation. Emphasize reducing high-energy-density and processed foods. Promote traditional low-calorie local foods.
standard.follow_up: Monthly community follow-up with community health worker; health center visit every 3 months
medications: Refer to clinic for blood pressure and blood glucose screening
Promote locally available low-calorie traditional foods
Reduce refined carbohydrates and cooking fats

F75: Rice water with oil and sugar
